report_name: Bitcoin Depot Loses $3.6M in Crypto After Attackers Steal Settlement Account Credentials

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Attackers used stolen credentials for digital asset settlement accounts to log in and transfer over 50 BTC from Bitcoin Depot's wallets.

identities.name: Bitcoin Depot
identities.description: A major US operator of cryptocurrency ATMs that suffered a cyberattack resulting in the theft of over $3.6 million in Bitcoin after attackers stole credentials for its digital asset settlement accounts.

infrastructure.name: Attacker-controlled Cryptocurrency Wallets
infrastructure.description: Cryptocurrency wallets used by the attackers to receive the stolen funds from Bitcoin Depot's settlement accounts.
